title: Paccheri with Flaky Pastry Crust
description: A creative Italian dish fusing pasta with a unique flaky pastry crust. This recipe combines the classic paccheri pasta with a delicate flaky crust for a truly unique taste.
instructions: Roll out the flaky pastry sheet into a large rectangle.
Place the paccheri pasta in the center of the pastry rectangle.
Drizzle the resinous honey over the pasta.
Fold the pastry over the pasta, pressing the edges to seal.
Brush the pastry with a little water and cut a few slits in the top.
Bake in the preheated oven for 25-30 minutes, or until the pastry is golden brown.
Optional: Sprinkle with powdered sugar for extra sweetness.
